title: gaultheria gajoensis
intro: Gaultheria gajoensis, also known as the Korean mountain tea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is a type of shrub that is native to the mountainous regions of Korea and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The leaves and stems of Gaultheria gajoensis have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, thanks to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Gaultheria gajoensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infuse its leaves in hot water to create a medicinal drink, and its leaves can also be dried and used in traditional medicine.
